extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate “By” and “Against” rows: all criminal, tax and statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil in the Against Company, Against Directors, Against Promoters and Against Subsidiaries rows, while the By rows are excluded; the only quantified matter against the Company is one material civil litigation of ₹127.50 million, with no quantified amount against Subsidiaries, so the group aggregate is ₹127.50 million. The contingent-liabilities table states a Total of ₹1,100.38 million as of September 30, 2024; this stated Total is used rather than re-summing line items. Company-wide customer concentration is reported as a percentage of total revenue from operations: for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, top five customers contributed 39.62% and top ten customers contributed 58.17%. The source monetary tables use ₹ million; ₹127.50 million converts to ₹12.75 crore and ₹1,100.38 million converts to ₹110.038 crore by dividing by 100.
